title: Filipino-Style Tortilla Filling
description: A twist on traditional tacos, this recipe combines the flavors of the Philippines with crispy tortillas.
instructions: Cook the tinpasta according to the packet instructions.
Heat a pan over medium heat and add the corn. Cook until slightly caramelized.
Cut the cooked tinpasta into small pieces.
Combine the cooked corn and tinpasta pieces in a bowl.
Warm the tortillas in a dry pan or in the microwave.
Spoon the corn and tinpasta mixture onto the tortillas.
